stories.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire on the Edge: Trump Warns of Bombing as Talks Stall in Pakistan
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump warned he is 'ready to go' back to war with Iran if no peace deal is reached before the ceasefire expires on Wednesday. Vice President JD Vance and top US officials are travelling to Islamabad for a second round of negotiations, but Iran says it refuses to negotiate under the 'shadow of threats' or a US naval blockade. The standoff has shut the Strait of Hormuz — a crucial oil shipping lane — pushing global oil prices higher.
stories.bigWordDef: A temporary agreement between two sides fighting a war to stop shooting and attacking each other, while they try to work out a peace deal.
stories.thinkQuestion: When two countries are at war, should one side be allowed to set conditions like 'no blockade' before agreeing to peace talks? Why or why not?
stories.videoQuery: Strait of Hormuz explained for students
stories.sourceQuote: Iran says it will not accept negotiations under 'shadow of threats' as Trump promises to continue US blockade of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Powerful 7.7-Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Japan, Triggering Tsunami Warning
stories.summary: A strong earthquake measuring 7.7 on the Richter scale struck off Japan's northeastern coast near Iwate prefecture on Monday, triggering a tsunami warning for waves up to 3 metres high. The warning was later lifted after waves of only 80 cm were detected, but the Japanese government has issued a special advisory warning citizens to stay alert for a possible larger earthquake within the week. Japan sits on the Pacific 'Ring of Fire' and experiences about 1,500 earthquakes every year.
stories.bigWordDef: Giant slabs of rock that make up Earth's outer shell. When they slide past, collide with, or move away from each other, the ground shakes — causing earthquakes.
stories.thinkQuestion: Japan experiences thousands of earthquakes every year. What kinds of buildings, warning systems, and habits might help people stay safe in an earthquake-prone country?
stories.videoQuery: Japan Ring of Fire earthquakes explained kids
stories.sourceQuote: Japan has lifted a tsunami warning that it had issued after a magnitude 7.7 earthquake struck off its northern coast.

stories.headline: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh Visits Germany to Strengthen India's Defence Ties
stories.summary: Indian Defence Minister Rajnath Singh arrived in Berlin on April 21 for a three-day official visit aimed at deepening the strategic defence partnership between India and Germany. During the visit, both defence ministers are expected to sign agreements on a Defence Industrial Cooperation Roadmap and joint training for UN peacekeeping missions. The visit reflects India's growing effort to build partnerships with European nations for defence manufacturing.
stories.bigWordDef: A special long-term agreement between two countries to work closely together on important matters like defence, technology, or trade — because it benefits both sides.
stories.thinkQuestion: Why might India want to build defence partnerships with countries in Europe, rather than just buying weapons from them?
stories.sourceQuote: Vice President JD Vance and top US officials are expected to depart today for Islamabad, Pakistan, ahead of a potential second round of talks with Iran.

stories.headline: 15-Year-Old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Continues to Rewrite IPL Record Books in 2026
stories.summary: Rajasthan Royals' teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, just 15 years old, has already smashed 452 runs at a jaw-dropping strike rate of 229.44 in IPL 2026 — stats that are almost unbelievable for any player, let alone a teenager. The Bihar-born left-hander became the youngest player in IPL history and the youngest centurion in men's T20 cricket last season, and is now on track to break records for the fastest 1,000 T20 runs. He has already hit bowlers as great as Jasprit Bumrah and Jofra Archer for boundaries.
stories.bigWordDef: In cricket, strike rate tells you how many runs a batter scores per 100 balls faced. A strike rate of 229 means scoring over 2 runs on every single ball — incredibly fast!
stories.thinkQuestion: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi started serious cricket training at age 4 and travelled 100 km every alternate day for practice. What does his story tell us about the role of hard work and family support in achieving greatness?
stories.sourceQuote: Days after turning 15, Rajasthan Royals opener Vaibhav Sooryavanshi found a perfect way to celebrate, tearing to a 15-ball half-century in a commanding eight-wicket victory over Chennai Super Kings.

stories.headline: Japan's Earthquake Warning Raises Fears of a Future 'Megaquake' Along Nankai Trough
stories.summary: Following Monday's powerful 7.7-magnitude quake, Japan's government has issued a special advisory warning citizens across 182 towns in seven prefectures to stay alert for a potentially stronger earthquake within the week. Scientists have long worried about a future 'megaquake' along the Nankai Trough — an underwater fault line where the Philippine Sea plate slides under the Asian plate — which could generate a tsunami killing up to 298,000 people. Japan accounts for nearly 18% of all seismic activity on Earth and experiences about 1,500 earthquakes every year.
stories.bigWordDef: Anything related to earthquakes. 'Seismic activity' means the shaking and movement of the Earth caused by plates moving underground.
stories.thinkQuestion: Scientists can predict that a megaquake is likely to happen within 30 years, but cannot say exactly when. How should governments and ordinary people prepare for a disaster that is likely — but whose exact date is unknown?
stories.sourceQuote: The Japanese government has warned of a slightly heightened risk of a megaquake in the next week after a strong 7.4-magnitude earthquake struck off the country's northeastern coast on Monday.

videos.title: Why is the Strait of Hormuz So Important?
videos.description: Learn why this narrow strip of water between Iran and Oman matters so much to the whole world — about 20% of the world's oil passes through it every day. When it's blocked, oil prices rise everywhere, including in India.

videos.title: Japan and the Ring of Fire: Why Earthquakes Happen There
videos.description: A clear explanation of tectonic plates, the Pacific Ring of Fire, and why Japan is one of the most earthquake-prone countries on Earth. Understand how tsunamis form and why early warning systems are so important.

videos.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi IPL 2026 Best Shots & Highlights
videos.description: Watch the 15-year-old cricket prodigy from Bihar smash world-class bowlers to all parts of the ground in IPL 2026. See why his strike rate of over 229 is being called one of the most extraordinary batting performances in T20 history.

infographic.caption: Japan: The World's Earthquake Capital
infographic.fact: ~1,500 earthquakes per year in Japan · 18% of all Earth's seismic activity · 7.7 magnitude quake hit April 20, 2026 · Nankai Trough megaquake could kill 298,000 · 70% chance of Nankai megaquake in next 30 years
infographic.question: If a megaquake is predicted with 70% probability in the next 30 years, what THREE steps would you take today to help communities prepare?

quiz.q: The Strait of Hormuz — currently blocked due to the US-Iran standoff — is a critical waterway for which commodity?
options: B) Crude oil and natural gas

quiz.q: How old is Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the Rajasthan Royals cricketer who became the youngest centurion in men's T20 cricket?
Japan's 7.7-magnitude earthquake on April 20, 2026 struck near which region?
What is the Nankai Trough, which scientists say could produce a future 'megaquake'?
options: A) A deep ocean trench where two tectonic plates meet south of Japan
B) A volcano chain in northern Japan
C) A river valley prone to flooding
D) An undersea nuclear test site

quiz.q: Tilak Varma's match-winning century for Mumbai Indians in IPL 2026 came off how many balls?
